name: Genesis Design System Showcase
description: Visual demonstrations of the six ontological categories and their application across different layout types.

image.name: Environment — Distributed Grid
image.description: Auto-fit responsive grid using genesis-environment('distributed'). Cards reflow from single column on mobile to multi-column on desktop without media queries.
image.caption: Distributed environment: auto-fit grid with container queries

image.name: Environment — Focused Reading
image.description: Single-column reading layout using genesis-environment('focused'). Content constrained to 60–75 characters for optimal readability.
image.caption: Focused environment: reading-optimized column width

image.name: Entity — Glassmorphism Surface
image.description: Component surface using genesis-entity('primary'). Frosted glass effect with backdrop-filter blur, subtle borders, and depth shadows.
image.caption: Primary entity: glassmorphism card with depth

image.name: Cognition — Fluid Typography
image.description: Fluid type scale using genesis-cognition variants. Headlines scale from mobile to ultrawide using clamp() with no breakpoints.
image.caption: Cognition system: fluid type scale across viewports

image.name: Atmosphere — Void Dark Mode
image.description: Deep dark surfaces using genesis-atmosphere('void'). OKLCH colors ensure consistent contrast ratios in dark mode.
image.caption: Void atmosphere: deep dark surfaces with OKLCH

image.name: Synapse — Interactive States
image.description: Interaction feedback using genesis-synapse variants. Navigate, execute, inquiry, and destructive actions each produce distinct hover and focus states.
image.caption: Synapse system: semantic interaction feedback
